title: poinciana pulcherrima f. flava
intro: Poinciana pulcherrima f. flava, also known as the yellow flamboyant, is a variety of the Poinciana pulcherrima plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its bright yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Poinciana pulcherrima f. flava include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
